# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

Resources:
  MyVpc:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPC"
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub Microservices-VPC
  
  InternetGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::InternetGateway"
    
  VPCDHCPOptions:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPCDHCPOptions"
    Properties:
      DomainName: !Join [ "-", ["aws", !Ref AWS::Region, !Ref AWS::AccountId]]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub DHCP-Options-For-VPC
  
  VPCDHCPOptionsAssociation:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::VPCDHCPOptionsAssociation"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      DhcpOptionsId: !Ref VPCDHCPOptions
  
  Subnet1:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2a
  
  Subnet2:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::Subnet"
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-west-2b
  
  NATGateway:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::NatGateway"
    Properties:
      AllocationId: !GetAtt NatAllocation.AllocationId
      SubnetId: !Ref Subnet1
  
  NatAllocation:
    Type: "AWS::EC2::EIP"
    Properties:
      Domain: vpc
